channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Silicon Valley leaders warn U.S. defense supply chain is unprepared for modern warfare
item.description: The U.S. defense industry must use private venture capital and dual-use technologies, according to top tech executives and venture capitalists.

item.title: SpaceX's public debut could shake up a $100 billion shadow market
item.description: SpaceX's IPO may trigger a prolonged reckoning in the venture secondaries market, the pre-IPO Wild West.

item.title: Taxpayers spent $33 billion on sports stadiums, getting fewer seats and higher prices
item.description: "No one has ever built a new stadium and made tickets cheaper. No one is trying to."

item.title: Abridge aims to become the operating system for medicine, with support from NVIDIA and Eli Lilly
item.description: The $5.3 billion ambient AI startup is expanding from clinical notes to billing, drug trials, and real-time insurance claims.
